allow: PowerShell($cmds = 'node','npm','npx'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\($p\){ "$c -> $p" } else { "$c -> INTROUVABLE" } })
PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { "gh trouvé: $\($gh.Source\)"; gh api repos/cybeledent/site-cybele-dent/pages 2>&1 } else { "gh introuvable" })
Bash(git commit -m 'Ajoute un numero de version au CSS \(cache-busting\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Ajoute la balise de verification Google Search Console *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Corrige le fond blanc du menu mobile \(backdrop-filter desactive\) *)
